latin: Cortana rogavit quid contra hostes facere vellet. Magister Princeps breviter respondit: 'arma mihi opus sunt.' deinde galeam induit et ad bellum processit.

questions.prompt: What does Master Chief say he needs?
What does he do after responding?
questions.target: He puts on his helmet and goes to war
choices: He puts on his helmet and goes to war

translation: Cortana asked what he wanted to do against the enemies. Master Chief responded briefly: 'I need a weapon.' Then he put on his helmet and advanced to war.
